Text: And I have spent a significant portion of my life visiting rural areas, small towns, and big cities, engaging with people of all demographics and emphasizing the same message.
examples: And I have devoted a major portion of this campaign to going across this country and looking for opportunities to go to white groups and African American groups and Latino groups and Asian American groups and say the same thing.

Text: And that is why, in education, I have proposed strategies that I am certain will advance our learning systems - advance them effectively and sustainably so that we will continue to excel academically internationally.
examples: And that is why, in this field, I have made recommendations which I am confident will move the American economy ahead - move it firmly and soundly so that there will never be a time when the Soviet Union will be able to challenge our superiority in this field.

Text: It's time we start making decisions that prioritize our communities.
examples: We have to start to spend the money now.

Text: I envision our educational system becoming a beacon of inspiration where the dreams of every child can soar, unfettered by obstacles, well into the future.
examples: And I want to bring to the White House a sense of strength and fiscal responsibility which will build a good strong foundation under which this country, or above which country can move, grow, invest, and build the best America for its people and for our kids and our grandkids.

Text: But it's essential we remain steadfast in our convictions, articulating our beliefs to citizens across this great nation.
examples: But I think it's important that we have a position, that we take it, and we state it to the American people.

Text: and the educators who preferred different teaching methods.
examples: and the military that liked it better the way it used to be.

Text: Some parts of this plan are beyond my comprehension.
examples: There are some things I don't understand.

Text: Just take a moment to appreciate the beauty of a sunset, how it brings peace and calm.
examples: I ask each of you just to look into your hearts, look into your guts.

Text: There's absolutely no question in my mind that in the heart of the suburban areas, with our new initiative on community gardening, with opportunities to enhance local parks and promote environmental awareness, this is going to provide an avenue for stronger neighborhood bonds which will pay significant social dividends.
examples: There is no doubt in my mind that in the downtown central cities, with the, with the new commitment on an energy policy, with a chance to revitalize homes and to make them more fuel efficient, with a chance for our synthetic fuels program, solar power, this will give us an additional opportunity for jobs which will pay rich dividends.

Text: So I will continue to advocate for success, ensuring the orchestration of the Big Band Jazz Festival, which will truly open doors for young musicians particularly.
examples: So I will keep on as president trying to get a successful conclusion to the GATT Round, the big Uruguay Round of trade which will really open up markets for our agriculture particularly.
